allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\northeastforu web\\destinations"; $files = @\("Why Assam.docx", "Why Arunachal Pradesh.docx", "Why Meghalaya.docx", "Why Manipur.docx", "Why Mizoram.docx", "Why Nagaland.docx", "Why Sikkim.docx", "Why Tripura.docx"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Write-Host "=== $f ==="; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("$PWD\\$f"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($xml, '<[^>]+>', ' '\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '\\s+', ' '\).Trim\(\); Write-Host $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2500, $text.Length\)\); Write-Host "" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -Assembly 'System.IO.Compression.FileSystem'; $f = "c:\\northeastforu web\\destinations\\Why Assam.docx"; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($f\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($xml, '<[^>]+>', ' '\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '\\s+', ' '\).Trim\(\); $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(4000, $text.Length\)\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -Assembly 'System.IO.Compression.FileSystem'; $files = @\("Why Arunachal Pradesh.docx","Why Meghalaya.docx","Why Manipur.docx","Why Mizoram.docx","Why Nagaland.docx","Why Sikkim.docx","Why Tripura.docx"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { Write-Host "=== $f ==="; $path = "c:\\northeastforu web\\destinations\\$f"; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($path\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($xml, '<[^>]+>', ' '\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '\\s+', ' '\).Trim\(\); Write-Host $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(5000, $text.Length\)\); Write-Host "" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -Assembly 'System.IO.Compression.FileSystem'; $f = "c:\\northeastforu web\\destinations\\Why Assam.docx"; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($f\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $xml = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($xml, '<[^>]+>', ' '\); $text = [regex]::Replace\($text, '\\s+', ' '\).Trim\(\); Write-Host $text)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\assam" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "assam-1"} | Select Name; Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\meghalaya" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "meghalaya-1"} | Select Name; Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\mizoram" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "mizoram-1"} | Select Name)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\assam" | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } | Select-String "assam"; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\meghalaya" | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } | Select-String "meghalaya"; Write-Host "---"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\northeastforu web\\frontend\\public\\images\\mizoram" | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } | Select-String "mizoram")
